description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of ethnic or western wear and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 2"UpperLeather upper with a nubuck inner lining at the backfoot and looped straps on the forefoot for absolute comfort and styleSlip on style for ease of wearLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable PU outsole with creeper-styled grooves throughout and has a grooved rubber heel patch for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
